title: Trails and Nails
description: Hello, player! Welcome to Trails and Nails, a mod focused on a new resource - fingernails!
body:
**Hello, player! Welcome to Trails and Nails, a mod focused on a new resource - fingernails!**

What can they be used for? Fingernails are very useful, here's an overview in case you want some information about uses, or if you're a confused user who doesn't understand how to get fingernails:

**Blocks**

- Block of Fingernails: Crafted with 9 fingernails. Will damage entities that walk on it, dealing damage relatively quickly. This block is affected by gravity.
- Fingernails Embankment: Crafted with 3 blocks of fingernails, in a similar way to slabs. Visually it also resembles a slab, although it isn't. Just like the block of fingernails it will deal damage to mobs walking on top of it and will also be affected by gravity.

**Items**

- Fingernails: Fingernails are obtainable by right-clicking with shears. This results in a 10 minute cooldown during which the player can't harvest fingernails. Fingernails restore 1 hunger and 0.2 saturation when eaten. They are also the base crafting ingredient for all the items in the mod.
- Fingernail Sandwich: Crafted with 1 bread as well as 3 fingernails. This baked deliciousness will restore 6 hunger and 7.2 saturation.
- Fingernail Cereal: Crafted with a bowl, a milk bucket and 6 fingernails. The most powerful food in the mod, restoring 10 hunger and 12 saturation. Unfortunately, just as all foods in bowls, it comes with the downside of being unstackable.

**Fingernail Power**

Speaking of power, there's a new mechanic introduced into the game. Eating fingernail-related foods will increase your "fingernail power". There are in total 20 levels. Each new level grants you:

- +2.5% to your speed, +50% on level 20.

- +5% to your damage, +100% on level 20.

- +5% to your knockback, +100% on level 20.

The amount of "fingernail power" you get depends on the food you consume. Fingernail meals (combinations with other ingredients) have a slight bonus. The values for all 3 foods are as follows:

- Fingernails - 0.05 level.
- Fingernail Sandwich - 0.2 level.
- Fingernail Cereal - 0.4 level.

**Game rules**

- fingernailTime: This gamerule indicates the time needed to grow back the fingernails in ticks (12000 by default).
- fingernailPowerModifier: This one affects the fingernail power obtained from fingernail foods and represents the percentage from the default values of these (100 by default).

**Hope you enjoy! Have a fantastic finger-biting experience! :D**

<sub>MCreator link:
https://mcreator.net/modification/98533/trails-and-nails<sub>
